Years of Excellence
Meet Your Instructor

Expert Instruction, Proven Results

Whether you're focused on fitness, self-improvement, or self-defense, Premier Martial Arts in Pembroke Pines is your destination. At Premier Martial Arts, we believe martial arts is more than just a workout — it's a powerful way to build confidence, discipline, and a strong sense of community. When you join our studio, you'll quickly develop practical self-defense skills while enjoying high-energy workouts and personal growth. Start your journey today and experience the transformative power of martial arts in a welcoming and supportive environment.

Lead Instructor

Mr. Rivera

Lead Instructor

Mr. Rivera is Premier Martial Arts Pines' dedicated lead instructor, bringing energy, patience, and expertise to every class. With a hands-on teaching style and a genuine passion for developing students of all ages, Mr. Rivera creates a positive, encouraging environment where children and adults alike discover their full potential. He has been instrumental in training over 2,300 students at the Pines location.

Why Premier Martial Arts Pines

The Premier Martial Arts Pines Difference

We don't just teach Martial Arts — we build better people.

Certified, Results-Driven Instructors

Our certified instructors are hands-on and genuinely invested in every student's growth — in technique and in character. With a 4.9-star Google rating and 11 years serving Pembroke Pines, our results speak for themselves.

Welcoming to All Ages & Levels

From young kids to adults, complete beginners to returning martial artists — everyone feels at home at Premier Martial Arts Pines. This is a family, not just a gym.

Results You Can See

Parents and students report improvements in focus, confidence, and discipline within the first 30–60 days. Our structured curriculum ensures every student progresses at every level.

What We Offer

Our Programs

Five age-specific programs — from Tiny Champs (ages 3–4) to Adult Martial Arts (ages 18+).

Ages 3–4

Tiny Champs

Tiny Champs is our beginner martial arts program designed specifically for 3–4-year-olds. Using fun, safe, and engaging play-based training, our expert instructors teach foundational skills including discipline, coordination, respect, confidence, and basic self-defense. The perfect introduction to martial arts for your little one.

Mon, Tue, Wed, Fri & Sat 30-min classes
Ages 5–7

Little Champions

Our Little Champions program helps your child develop far beyond the mat. Students gain the physical benefits of martial arts training while building the life skills that matter most — discipline, confidence, focus, and leadership. Instructors create a positive, encouraging environment where every child thrives.

Mon–Sat 45-min classes
Ages 8–12

PMA Kids

PMA Kids takes martial arts training to the next level for older children. Students develop discipline, confidence, focus, and leadership through challenging, age-appropriate instruction. We go beyond physical technique — building character and strong values that stay with students for life.

Mon–Sat 45-min classes
Ages 13–17

Teens Martial Arts

Our teens program is a high-energy, supportive training environment designed to help teenagers build real strength, confidence, discipline, and self-defense skills. Designed specifically for teenagers, it channels energy positively and builds the mental toughness and resilience they need to excel in school, sports, and life.

Mon, Tue & Thu 60-min classes
Ages 18+

Adult Martial Arts

Our adult program is based on Krav Maga and Kickboxing, offering a full-body workout with practical self-defense skills. Whether your goal is fitness, stress relief, or real-world self-defense, our certified instructors will push you to your full potential in a supportive, welcoming environment.

Mon–Thu 60-min classes
Simple Process

How To Get Started

Three easy steps to your first class — no experience required.

1

Book Your Free Trial

Click the button below or call us at (954) 431-5111 to reserve your free intro session at a time that works for you.

2

Come Try It Out

Arrive in comfortable workout clothes. We'll give you a tour, introduce you to the team, and guide you through your first class.

3

Join the Family

If you love it — and you will — we'll find the perfect program and membership that fits your goals, schedule, and budget.

No commitment. No experience needed. Just show up.

We highly recommend Premier Martial Arts to any family looking for a great martial arts program for their kids."

His progress has been amazing in such a short time — not only in martial art skills, but he's also more confident and disciplined. The instructors are all very knowledgeable, respectful, and treat everyone like family. The owner, Mr. Asesor, and the office manager, Mr. Vega, make us feel like family. I recommend PMA wholeheartedly!"

via Google

M
Michelle Humphreys
2 months ago
★★★★★

"PMA is a great school! My son started when he was 3 years old when his neurologist suggested karate to help with behavioral issues. They welcomed him with open arms. In the past 2 years he's shown tremendous improvement. They work hard on technical skill but for me the value is in character building. He looks forward to class. The instructors are kind yet firm — it's a safe space for all ages."

via Google

Got Questions?

Frequently Asked Questions

Do I need any experience to start? +
Absolutely not! Most of our students start with zero martial arts experience. Our intro classes are specifically designed for complete beginners. Our instructors will meet you exactly where you are and guide you step by step.
How old do kids need to be to start? +
We welcome students as young as 4 years old. Our programs are grouped by age so every student trains at exactly the right level. Call us at (954) 431-5111 and we'll help you find the perfect fit.
How much does membership cost? +
We offer several membership options to fit different budgets and goals. Fill out the Starter Kit form and one of our coaches will send you our full pricing guide, class schedule, and current promotions — no commitment required.
What should I wear to my first class? +
For your free trial, just wear comfortable athletic clothes — shorts and a t-shirt are perfect. No special equipment or uniform is needed until you decide to join.
How often should I train to see results? +
We recommend training 2–3 times per week for consistent progress. Most students notice real improvements in fitness, focus, and technique within the first 30–60 days.
Is martial arts safe for my child? +
Safety is our top priority, especially for our youngest students. All classes are structured, supervised, and taught with age-appropriate techniques. Martial arts is consistently ranked among the safest youth sports.
Do you offer family discounts? +
Yes! We offer family membership packages for households with multiple training members. Ask about our family rates during your free trial.
What if I can't make it to classes regularly? +
Life happens! We offer flexible make-up class policies and some membership tiers include open mat times so you can train around your schedule. Just talk to us — we'll find a solution.
